## Runtime.RuntimeContext.createFillingSession() method

Creates an editing session for a filling recipe at a target weight. Used by confection sessions to manage filling scaling.

**Signature:**

```typescript
createFillingSession(filling: IRuntimeFillingRecipe, targetWeight: Measurement): Result<EditingSession>;
```

</td><td>
